name: Dominion Energy, Inc.
description: Dominion Energy, Inc. is a major American power and energy company headquartered in Richmond, Virginia. It operates a diverse portfolio of energy assets, including regulated electric and natural gas utilities that serve millions of customers across several states. The company is a significant producer of electricity through a mix of nuclear, coal, natural gas, and renewable energy sources. Dominion Energy is committed to a clean energy transition, focusing on decarbonization and the expansion of offshore wind and solar projects while maintaining reliable energy infrastructure.
